Wave-1 family-inheritance fix 2026-05-10: pigbeater's base_trick=eggbeater caused loader to compute trick_family=eggbeater, leaving pigbeater orphaned in a family-of-one. eggbeater itself has trick_family=legover (per pt2 'eggbeater = atomic legover'). Override pigbeater.trick_family to legover so it groups with the legover-family compounds (eggbeater, double-leg-over, flurry, merkon, magellan).
